battleTraits.name: Better Late Than Never
battleTraits.effect: A unit of Ironguts with 4 models is not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, in the third battle round, that unit can use the ‘Let’s Get Stuck In’ ability.

battleTraits.name: Let's Get Stuck In
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit wholly within friendly territory, wholly within 6" of the battlefield edge, and not in combat.

enhancements.name: Savage Instincts
enhancements.timing: Reaction: You declared a FIGHT ability for your general
enhancements.effect: Pick a friendly unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within your general’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by your general has been resolved.

enhancements.name: Nasty Trap
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Give the target your general’s Trap token. While the target has a Trap token, each time the target is picked to use a Move or Charge ability, roll a dice. On a 4+, that Move or Charge ability has no effect and the target’s Trap token is removed.

enhancements.name: Massive Bulk
enhancements.effect: Add 2 to the Health characteristic of your general.

enhancements.name: Veteran Hunter
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s combat attacks that target that unit.

regimentAbilities.name: It's a Hard Life
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly Gnoblars unit within your general’s combat range to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect:
Roll a D3. On a 2+:
- Heal (X) your general where X is equal to the roll.
- 1 model in that Gnoblars unit is slain.

regimentAbilities.name: Frenzied Artillery
regimentAbilities.effect: If the unmodified charge roll for a friendly Gnoblar Scraplauncher is 6+, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the target's Companion weapons for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Staying Useful
abilities.effect: While any of this unit's Gnoblar or Frost Sabre tokens are on the battlefield, this unit has WARD (5+). Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, remove 1 of this unit's tokens from the battlefield. If this unit's Frost Sabre token has been removed, it can no longer attack with its Frost Sabre's Fangs.

abilities.name: No Slacking!
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly Infantry unit wholly within 12" of this unit.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add the result to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Rain of Scrap
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any models slain this turn by this unit's shooting attacks to be the target.
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Down to the Ironguts
abilities.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to this unit's control score.

abilities.name: No Shortage of Volunteers
abilities.effect: You can return D3 models to this unit.
